mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_regulation_check WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_regulation_check WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tb_regulation_check WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_regulation_check ( check_id, check_name, related_regulation, check_type, assignee, due_date, progress, status, deleted, created_at, modified_at ) VALUES ( #{checkId}, #{checkName}, #{relatedRegulation}, #{checkType}, #{assignee}, #{dueDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{progress}, #{status}, #{deleted}, GETDATE(), GETDATE() )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_regulation_check SET check_id = #{checkId}, check_name = #{checkName}, related_regulation = #{relatedRegulation}, check_type = #{checkType}, assignee = #{assignee}, due_date = #{dueDate,jdbcType=DATE}, progress = #{progress}, status = #{status}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_regulation_check SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
